commands.argv: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
commands.summary: 59 stdlib tests passed; Hermes adapter tests are targeted because parent adapter test directory is outside the WS-16 write set.

commands.argv: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m agent_lifecycle audit ownership --manifest plans/standalone-v1/plan.manifest.json --base main --path adapters/hermes --path conformance/adapters/hermes --path tests/adapters/hermes --path plans/standalone-v1/evidence/ws-16 --fail-on-unowned --fail-on-forbidden
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m agent_lifecycle.neutrality scan --scope current-tree-complete --policy policy/neutrality.policy.json --require-zero-findings
commands.summary: Current tree neutrality scan passed with zero findings.

commands.argv: rg -n "project markers" adapters/hermes conformance/adapters/hermes tests/adapters/hermes || true
commands.summary: No source-project markers found in Hermes adapter files.

summary: WS-16 adds Hermes EXPERIMENTAL offline adapter projection with skill-directory and slash-command metadata, without duplicating lifecycle core semantics.
